\tzpentry{ID3414}{Field Strength Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3414 introduces Field Strength Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathrm{Fix}(\sigma) \;:=\; \{\Psi\in\mathcal{F}:\ \sigma\Psi=\Psi\}. \label{eq:fix_sigma} \end{equation}
